name_cn:
MIUMIU Nappa Calfskin Tote
Black
The embossed logo on the front blends seamlessly with the calfskin texture, soft and delicate to the touch〰️Soft luster texture, low-key and luxurious
Removable shoulder strap for versatile styling, handheld or crossbody looks great, compact yet spacious
Suitable for commuting, dates, and daily wear, organized interior for peace of mind, premium texture that is a must-have✨
🔍Size:22*9*9cm
📌Model:5NE851M550
